notes:
v1.4.6 Update
✨ GM pity reset: GMs can reset their own pity progress and 50/50 featured guarantee from the gacha screen.
🐛 Daggerheart resource bars: Unboxing styles no longer override HP and Stress bars on Daggerheart character sheets.

announcement.title: 🎁 Unboxing the Mystery v1.4.6
announcement.content:
Unboxing the Mystery v1.4.6 adds a GM pity reset and fixes Daggerheart resource bars.

  • GM pity reset: GMs can reset their own pity progress and 50/50 featured guarantee for the current gacha pool without affecting other users or pools.
  • Daggerheart resource bars: Unboxing styles no longer override HP and Stress bars on Daggerheart character sheets.
